title: Vision Framework
description: Use Apple's Vision framework for image analysis, face detection, and more.

sections.title: Vision Framework Demo
sections.expectedOutput:
Vision Framework - Available Requests:

• Face Detection: VNDetectFaceRectanglesRequest
• Face Landmarks: VNDetectFaceLandmarksRequest
• Image Classification: VNClassifyImageRequest
• Text Recognition: VNRecognizeTextRequest
• Barcode Detection: VNDetectBarcodeRequest
• Horizon Detection: VNDetectHorizonRequest
• Rectangle Detection: VNDetectRectanglesRequest

--- Example: Setting up a text recognition request ---

[Code listing]
sections.solution:
import Foundation
import Vision

let request = VNRecognizeTextRequest()
request.recognitionLevel = .accurate
print("Text recognition configured for accuracy")

sections.question: Which VNRequest type would you use to extract text from an image?
sections.explanation: VNRecognizeTextRequest performs OCR (Optical Character Recognition) to extract text from images.
